tests.title: SC-CA-06: empty arrays - reverts with 'Empty batch'

tests.code:
const { anchor, issuer } = await (0, network_helpers_1.loadFixture)(deployFixture);
await (0, chai_1.expect)(anchor.connect(issuer).batchAnchorCredentials([], [])).to.be.revertedWith("Empty batch");

tests.code:

await (0, chai_1.expect)(registry.connect(nonAdmin).registerIssuer(issuer.address)).to.be.revertedWith("Not admin");
